description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a light gray quilted top surface featuring a repeating pattern of large, slightly raised circular tufts. The sides of the mattress are banded with alternating dark and light horizontal stripes, giving it a modern, layered appearance. Two pairs of vertical white handles are visible on the longer sides, likely for ease of carrying or repositioning. The mattress appears to be of medium thickness, suggesting a combination of foam and possibly innerspring or pocket coil construction inside. The edges are neatly finished with a continuous piping that reinforces the structure and adds a subtle visual accent. The overall look is clean, contemporary, and well-suited for use in a bedroom or as a discarded item in an urban environment.
description: A modern, light gray mattress with a quilted circular tuft pattern, striped sides, and white carrying handles. The edges are reinforced with continuous piping for a clean, finished look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the quilted top surface and the clean, uninterrupted edge piping; no handles are visible from this angle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying two pairs of white carrying handles and the striped banding along the mattress sides.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the quilted top and edge piping visible, but no handles present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, again showing two pairs of white handles and the striped side design.
attribute_pattern_design: Quilted circular tuft pattern evenly distributed across the top surface.
attribute_edge_piping: Continuous edge piping in white, medium thickness, running around the entire perimeter of the mattress.
